channel.title: Add error tracking (e.g. Sentry) to the most public frontity projects
channel.description:
# Description Add an error tracking solution to our public frontity projects: frontity.org twentytwenty.frontity.org mars.frontity.org
This will allow us to get information about crashes / errors that normally only happen in users browsers including the full stack traces.
# User Stories > As a **frontity developer** > I want to **know when an error happens in a fronitity site when a user visits it** > so that **I can have better visibility**
## Details The free plan has only 1 user and up to 5k events per month The cheapest Tier is $29 / mo and has 100k events but has a trial period.
It seems that the free plan is good for solo projects, so we can start on the Trial and see how it goes.
# Examples getsentry.com <-- I would recommend this rollbar.com (Has been tried before on other projects and resulted in a lot of noisy data mostly from ads)

item.title: Add error tracking (e.g. Sentry) to the most public frontity projects
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
4 posts were split to a new topic: How to add Sentry to a Frontity Project?

Read full topic
item.source: Add error tracking (e.g. Sentry) to the most public frontity projects

item.title: Add error tracking (e.g. Sentry) to the most public frontity projects
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Description

Add an error tracking solution to our public frontity projects:

Frontity

Frontity - The React framework for WordPress

Frontity is the easiest way to create lightning fast websites using WordPress and React. Open source and free to use.


twentytwenty.frontity.org
mars.frontity.org

This will allow us to get information about crashes / errors that normally only happen in users browsers including the full stack traces.

User Stories

As a frontity developer
I want to know when an error happens in a fronitity site when a user visits it
so that I can have better visibility

Details

The free plan has only 1 user and up to 5k events per month
The cheapest Tier is $29 / mo and has 100k events but has a trial period.

It seems that the free plan is good for solo projects, so we can start on the Trial and see how it goes.

Examples

getsentry.com <-- I would recommend this
rollbar.com (Has been tried before on other projects and resulted in a lot of noisy data mostly from ads)

Read full topic
item.source: Add error tracking (e.g. Sentry) to the most public frontity projects
